title: MoonSites
description: Lunar landing sites. Single file at data/moon-sites.json. Per-locale editorial in data/i18n/[locale]/moon-sites/[id].json. The `agency` enum is the operating org (drives branding and logo); `nation` is the country (drives PRD-006's 'five nations' framing — Soviet missions are ROSCOSMOS-attributed for branding continuity but USSR-attributed for the historical narrative).

year.description: Year of landing or planned launch

landing_date.description: ISO 8601 calendar date of touchdown (UTC); omit for PLANNED missions

surface_status.description: completed = mission ended; ongoing = lander/rover still active; planned = not yet launched

surface_duration_days.description: Total time on surface (days). Omitted for ongoing or planned missions.

eva_duration_hours.description: Total EVA time across all spacewalks (hours). Crewed missions only.

samples_kg.description: Mass of returned samples (kg); 0 if no return
